title: Advanced Web Browsing
subtitle: Search Smart, Stay Safe!
overview: This session helps students learn advanced web browsing skills including smart searching, using browser tools, managing tabs, bookmarks, downloads, and staying safe online.

images._note: Add screenshots of browsers, search examples, classroom activities, and student practice photos.

activity.title: Smart Web Browsing Activity
steps: Open Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge
Open three different websites in separate tabs
Download one safe image for a project
Use Ctrl + T to open a new tab
Use Ctrl + D to bookmark the page
Challenge: Find information using smart keywords

quiz.q: What is a web browser used for?
quiz.explanation: A web browser helps users access and explore websites online.

quiz.q: Which of these is a web browser?
quiz.explanation: Google Chrome is a popular web browser.

quiz.q: What is the purpose of tabs in a browser?
quiz.explanation: Tabs help users open and switch between multiple websites.
Ctrl + T opens a new browser tab.

options: A tool to search information online
quiz.explanation: Search engines help users find websites and information.

quiz.q: Which search engine is most commonly used?
quiz.explanation: Google is one of the most widely used search engines.

quiz.q: What is a bookmark used for?
quiz.explanation: Bookmarks help save websites for quick access later.
Incognito Mode allows private browsing without saving history.
Ctrl + D saves the current webpage as a bookmark.
Internet safety helps protect users from scams and harmful websites.

quiz.q: What should students check before downloading files?
quiz.explanation: Students should always download files from trusted and safe websites.

quiz.q: Which symbol shows a secure website?
quiz.explanation: The lock icon near the URL shows a secure connection.

quiz.q: What happens when too many tabs are open?
quiz.explanation: Too many tabs can use more memory and slow browsing.

quiz.q: What is the address bar used for?
quiz.explanation: The address bar is used to type website addresses and searches.

quiz.q: Which skill improves with advanced web browsing?
quiz.explanation: Advanced web browsing improves many important digital skills.
